name: Cherry Blossom Festival (Jinhae)
traditions: Cherry blossom tunnels along Yeojwacheon Stream; Gyeonghwa Station viewing; military band parades; cultural performances.
historicalBackground: The Jinhae Cherry Blossom Festival began in 1952 as a memorial for Admiral Yi Sun-sin. The area has 360,000 cherry trees, the most in South Korea.
description: South Korea's largest cherry blossom festival, where 360,000 trees create magical pink tunnels along streams and railway stations.
